proj_movie_bucketlist.title: Movie Bucketlist
proj_movie_bucketlist.description: A full-stack web app for saving and organizing a personal movie bucketlist, with interactive selection tools and persistent storage for future reference
bullets: Built REST APIs using Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB to enable communication between a React front-end and backend services
Integrated the OMDb API to fetch and display detailed movie metadata when adding films to the collection
Implemented an interactive wheel-based selector for randomly choosing movies and saving selections for future viewing

proj_bingo_widget.title: Bingo Widget Creator
proj_bingo_widget.description: A full-stack web app for creating customizable Bingo card widgets, designed for embeddable use within platforms like Notion, with user authentication and persistent data storage
bullets: Built a ReactJS interface for creating and customizing Bingo cards, supporting dynamic layout generation and user-defined content and styling
Designed a backend system using Express.js, Node.js, and MongoDB to manage persistent storage, user data, and card configurations
Implemented Google OAuth authentication via Google Cloud to manage secure user sessions and streamline account access flow
